keyRules: A maximum of 120 m above ground level (EASA Open Category)
Online registration on the AACR portal (uas.caa.ro): 90 € + VAT (~108 €), valid for 1 year
Mandatory A1/A3 Online Training — Minimum age: 16
Flying in the city is prohibited — restrictions on urban flight are very strict
30-km exclusion zone along the border with UKRAINE (Northern Dobrogea, Sulina–Galați) — flight prohibited by order of the Ministry of National Defense
Always keep the drone within direct line of sight (VLOS)
Never fly over people, crowds, or public events
A minimum distance of 8 km from airports (the Henri Coandă protection zone is 8–10 km)
Night flights are prohibited without specific authorization
The Danube Delta and National Parks: Additional Restrictions Apply
importantNotes: Registration is 100% online via the AACR portal (uas.caa.ro) — there is no need to travel to Bucharest
Registration fee: 90 € + VAT (~108 €), valid for 1 year
Flying in the city is essentially prohibited for recreational purposes
The 30-km exclusion zone covers the border with Ukraine (Northern Dobruja), pursuant to a Ministry of National Defense order issued in September 2023
The GDPR applies to the collection of identifiable images
Registration and A1/A3 certificates issued by another EU/EEA country are valid in Romania—without the need for re-registration (mutual recognition, EU Reg. 2019/947)

fields.disclaimerText: Always check the AACR’s official sources before flying. This app is a tool—not a legal authority. Romania applies EASA regulations with strict national additions, including flight bans in cities and border exclusion zones.
